تم تحسين قواعد إعادة تعيين الدرع. عند استخدام عنصر درع جديد، إذا كانت مدته أطول من وقت الدرع المتبقي للقلعة، فسيتم تحديث الدرع إلى المدة الجديدة.

title: Hollywood Merge
notes:
Update Now for Exciting New Features!
- Episode 69 Is Here: After agreeing to part ways, could the story really end here?
- Yacht Pass Sets Sail on July 17: You'll have the time of your life on board and unlock exclusive rewards!
- Glitter Party Merge Event Starts July 20: Don't miss out on this spectacular party!
- Fireworks Ball Merge Event Opens July 28: Let's share an unforgettable night beneath the fireworks!
- New Theme Unlocks July 27: Hollywood's lit up and filled with balloons !
